debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
h₀ : 4 ≤ n
⊢ n ^ 2 ≤ n.factorial

failed_attempts:
step h ih =>
    calc
      (n + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n.factorial := Nat.mul_le_mul_left (n + 1) ih
      _ = (n + 1).factorial := rfl

succ n hn ih =>
    rw [factorial_succ, pow_two]
    apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) ih

induction n, h₀ using Nat.le_induction with k hk ih
  · norm_num
  · rw [factorial_succ]
    nlinarith

step {k} hk ih =>
    calc
      (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ ih
      _ = (k + 1) ! := rfl
succ k hk IH => nlinarith [factorial_succ k]

succ k hk ih =>
    calc (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := Nat.mul_le_mul_left (k + 1) ih
      _ = (k + 1) ! := by rw [Nat.factorial_succ]

succ k hk ih =>
    rw [factorial_succ, pow_two]
    apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
    exact Nat.le_trans (by nlinarith) ih

succ k hck IH =>

    nlinarith

succ n h ih =>

      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n.factorial := Nat.mul_le_mul_left (n + 1) ih
      _ = (n + 1).factorial := rfl

succ k h ih =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ]
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) (Nat.mul_le_mul_left (k + 1) ih)

succ n h ih =>
    calc (n + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ! := Nat.mul_le_mul_left (n + 1) ih
      _ = (n + 1) ! := rfl

succ k hk ih =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ]
    nlinarith

induction' n, h₀ with k hk ih
  · norm_num
  · calc (k + 1) ^ 2 = (k + 1) * (k + 1) := by ring
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := Nat.mul_le_mul_left (k + 1) (by nlinarith [pow_two])
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := Nat.mul_le_mul_left (k + 1) ih
      _ = (k + 1)! := rfl

induction n, h₀ using Nat.le_induction with k hk ih
  · norm_num

succ n hn ih =>
    calc (n + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n.factorial := Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ ih
      _ = (n + 1).factorial := rfl

induction n, h₀ using Nat.le_induction with n hn hI
  · norm_num
  · calc (n + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ! := Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ hI
      _ = (n + 1)! := rfl

succ n h ih =>
    calc (n + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ! := Nat.mul_le_mul_left (n + 1) ih

succ k hk ih =>

succ n h hn =>
